name: Uncle Ton's Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch square cake pan.
3. Mix all of the ingredients together, combining them well.
4. Spread the mixture in the cake pan and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until dry on top and almost firm to the touch.
5. Let cool for 10-15 minutes, then cut into 2-inch squares.
